description: Flying with 2 COTE. Black cap. All red bill. Flight more bouncy than that of COTE. Head "stubbier," bill smaller, tail longer. Wings even pearly gray above. Narrow border to trailing edge of primaries barely visible. At same time, on companion COTEs, the dark wedge on primaries and trailing edge on underside of primaries easily visible. Ashy gray chest and belly extending onto chin causing a white "line" on cheek between black cap and gray underparts. Tail simply appeared white. Too far to see edge darkness. Birds circling about, seemingly searching for food, providing a variety of angles for viewing
